name: pet-me-master
title: Pet Me Master - Autonomous Aavegotchi Petting
description: Fully autonomous gotchi petting system with instant notifications and auto-fallback. Checks blockchain for ready gotchis, sends Telegram alerts, and auto-pets after 1 hour if you're busy. Perfect for maximizing kinship while staying frenly! 👻💜
author: aaigotchi

steps: Clone repository to OpenClaw skills directory
Configure your gotchi IDs and wallet
Add cron job for scheduled checks

usage: Fully automated! Just configure once and the system handles everything. Checks gotchi status every ~12 hours, sends notifications when ready, and auto-pets if you don't respond within 1 hour.
